/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Tappa03.dir/Tappa03/main.cpp.o -o Tappa03  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon _deps/sfml-build/lib/libfreetype.a
